title: approvals.proposed_payload — action_type=other (v1)
description: Escape-hatch contract for ad-hoc approvals that do not match a typed action_type yet. Forces a human-readable summary so the approval card is meaningful even when the payload is bespoke. Validated app-side.

summary_hebrew.description: Mandatory Hebrew one-liner shown in the approval card.

human_intent.description: Plain-language description of what will happen if approved. Audit-grade.

external_target.description: Optional pointer to the external system (URL, slug, or freeform identifier).

payload.description: Optional freeform payload. The consuming automation is responsible for interpretation; no schema in v1.

promotion_note.description: Author's note on whether this should be promoted to a typed action_type in a future enum addition. Audit-only.
